_global.text:
## Summary
Build RecipeRack as a single-container full-stack app: a NestJS + TypeORM + PostgreSQL API with JWT `full_auth`, serving a React (Vite) SPA that provides an authenticated, searchable, favorite-able recipe CRUD grid — replacing the current nginx placeholder.

## Scope
### Files to modify
- `Dockerfile` — replace nginx placeholder with a multi-stage build: stage 1 builds the React frontend, stage 2 builds NestJS, final Node image runs the API which also serves the SPA on port 80.
- `k8s/deployment.yaml` — add `DATABASE_URL`/`JWT_SECRET` via existing `app-secrets`, add `readinessProbe`/`livenessProbe` on `/api/health`, set container port 80.
- `index.html` — remove (replaced by frontend build output); or keep only as the Vite template under `frontend/`.

### Files to create
**Backend (`backend/`)**
- `package.json`, `tsconfig.json`, `nest-cli.json` — NestJS project config.
- `src/main.ts` — bootstrap; global `ValidationPipe` (whitelist), global prefix so API lives at `/api`, serve static SPA, bind `0.0.0.0:80`.
- `src/app.module.ts` — TypeORM root config (from `DATABASE_URL`), `ServeStaticModule` (serves `frontend/dist`, SPA fallback excluding `/api*`), feature modules.
- `src/config/data-source.ts` — TypeORM DataSource for migrations.
- `src/common/filters/all-exceptions.filter.ts` — global filter mapping TypeORM connection errors → **503**, `EntityNotFound` → **404**, validation → **400**.
- `src/health/health.controller.ts` — public `GET /api/health` and `GET /api/health/deep` (deep pings DB).
- `src/users/user.entity.ts` — `id`, `email` (unique), `passwordHash`, `role` (`'admin' | 'user'`), timestamps.
- `src/users/users.service.ts`, `users.module.ts`.
- `src/auth/auth.module.ts`, `auth.service.ts`, `auth.controller.ts` — `POST /api/auth/signup`, `POST /api/auth/login`, `POST /api/auth/logout`, `GET /api/auth/me`.
- `src/auth/jwt.strategy.ts`, `jwt-auth.guard.ts`, `roles.guard.ts`, `roles.decorator.ts` — JWT (passport-jwt) + role checks (401 vs 403).
- `src/auth/dto/signup.dto.ts`, `login.dto.ts` — class-validator DTOs.
- `src/recipes/recipe.entity.ts` — `id` (uuid), `ownerId` (FK), `title`, `ingredients` (`text[]`/jsonb), `instructions` (text), `isFavorite` (bool, default false), timestamps; index on `ownerId` + functional index `lower(title)`.
- `src/recipes/recipes.controller.ts` — `GET /api/recipes?q=`, `POST /api/recipes`, `GET /api/recipes/:id`, `PATCH /api/recipes/:id`, `DELETE /api/recipes/:id`, `PATCH /api/recipes/:id/favorite`; all under `JwtAuthGuard`, scoped to `req.user.id`.
- `src/recipes/recipes.service.ts` — CRUD + case-insensitive `ILIKE` title search, owner scoping, `EntityNotFound` on miss.
- `src/recipes/dto/create-recipe.dto.ts`, `update-recipe.dto.ts` — validate `title` non-empty, `ingredients` `@ArrayNotEmpty`, `instructions` non-empty.
- `src/migrations/*` — initial schema migration.

**Frontend (`frontend/`)**
- `package.json`, `vite.config.ts` (`base: '/faithful-e2e-a/'`), `index.html`, `tsconfig.json`.
- `src/main.tsx` — React Router with `basename="/faithful-e2e-a"`, TanStack Query provider.
- `src/api/client.ts` — fetch wrapper: base URL `/faithful-e2e-a/api`, attaches JWT, on 401 redirect to `/login`, surfaces 503/404 messages.
- `src/auth/AuthContext.tsx`, `RequireAuth.tsx` — token storage, route guard.
- `src/pages/LoginPage.tsx`, `SignupPage.tsx`, `HomePage.tsx` (grid + search bound to `?q=`), `RecipeDetailPage.tsx`, `RecipeFormPage.tsx` (create/edit).
- `src/components/AppHeader.tsx` (renders "RecipeRack"), `RecipeCard.tsx`, `RecipeGrid.tsx`, `SearchBar.tsx`, `FavoriteToggle.tsx`, `EmptyState.tsx`, `ConfirmDialog.tsx`.
- `src/styles.css` — responsive CSS grid.

**Infra**
- `k8s/postgres.yaml` — Postgres Deployment + Service + PVC in namespace `colossus-faithful-e2e-a`.
- Update `kustomization.yaml` — add `k8s/postgres.yaml` to resources.

### Dependencies
- Backend: `@nestjs/*`, `typeorm`, `pg`, `@nestjs/typeorm`, `@nestjs/jwt`, `@nestjs/passport`, `passport`, `passport-jwt`, `bcrypt`, `class-validator`, `class-transformer`, `@nestjs/serve-static`.
- Frontend: `react`, `react-dom`, `react-router-dom`, `@tanstack/react-query`, `vite`, `typescript`.

### Integrations
- None (no third-party external services; PostgreSQL is first-party infrastructure).

### Assumptions
- **Recipes are per-user** (owner-scoped); "all recipes" means all of the logged-in user's recipes. Favorite state is per recipe per owner.
- **Stack chosen** (greenfield, no config source): NestJS + TypeORM + React/Vite, single container. JWT auth (spec stack is JWT-appropriate).
- **First signup becomes `admin`**; subsequent users get role `user`. Public routes: `/login`, `/signup`, `/api/health`, `/api/health/deep`.
- Frontend base path is `/faithful-e2e-a/` to match the ingress rewrite.
- `ingredients` stored as a string array; each ingredient is a free-text line.
- RolesGuard is wired so a role-gated endpoint returns 403; recipe endpoints require an authenticated user.

## Implementation Plan

### Step 1: Scaffold backend & database layer
**Files:** `backend/package.json`, `tsconfig.json`, `nest-cli.json`, `src/main.ts`, `src/app.module.ts`, `src/config/data-source.ts`
**Change:** Init NestJS. Configure TypeORM from `DATABASE_URL`, global `/api` prefix, global `ValidationPipe({ whitelist: true })`, listen on `0.0.0.0:80`.

### Step 2: Users + Auth (full_auth)
**Files:** `src/users/*`, `src/auth/*`
**Change:** `User` entity + service. Auth service hashes passwords with bcrypt, issues JWT. Signup: first user → `admin`, else `user`. Endpoints for signup/login/logout/me. `JwtAuthGuard` (401 on missing/invalid token), `RolesGuard` + `@Roles()` (403 on role mismatch).

### Step 3: Recipes domain
**Files:** `src/recipes/*`
**Change:** `Recipe` entity with `ownerId` FK, indexes on `ownerId` and `lower(title)`. Service implements CRUD scoped to owner, `ILIKE '%q%'` title search, favorite toggle, throws `EntityNotFoundError` on miss. Controller guarded by `JwtAuthGuard`.

### Step 4: Error handling & health
**Files:** `src/common/filters/all-exceptions.filter.ts`, `src/health/health.controller.ts`
**Change:** Global filter → 404 (not found), 400 (validation), 503 (DB unavailable). Public health endpoints; `/api/health/deep` runs `SELECT 1`.

### Step 5: Migration
**Files:** `src/migrations/*`
**Change:** Generate initial schema migration; run on container start.

### Step 6: Frontend scaffold & routing
**Files:** `frontend/*`, `src/main.tsx`, `src/api/client.ts`, `src/auth/*`
**Change:** Vite + React Router with `basename`/`base` `/faithful-e2e-a`. Define URL-addressable routes, each a navigable flow node:
- `/login`, `/signup` — public.
- `/` — recipe grid; search bound to `?q=`.
- `/recipes/new` — add form.
- `/recipes/:id` — detail; delete confirm addressed as `?confirm=delete`.
- `/recipes/:id/edit` — edit form.
`RequireAuth` wraps all non-public routes; 401 responses redirect to `/login`.

### Step 7: UI components & screens
**Files:** `src/components/*`, `src/pages/*`, `src/styles.css`
**Change:** `AppHeader` shows "RecipeRack". `HomePage` renders responsive `RecipeGrid` of `RecipeCard` (title + `FavoriteToggle`), `SearchBar` (updates `?q=`), `EmptyState` when no matches. Forms validate required fields (title, ≥1 ingredient, instructions) client-side plus server enforcement. Detail page shows title/ingredients/instructions with edit/delete.

### Step 8: Containerize & deploy
**Files:** `Dockerfile`, `k8s/deployment.yaml`, `k8s/postgres.yaml`, `kustomization.yaml`
**Change:** Multi-stage Docker (build FE → build BE → run Node serving both on 80). Add Postgres manifest + PVC. Wire `DATABASE_URL`/`JWT_SECRET` secrets, add probes on `/api/health`.

## Testing Strategy
- **Auth:** signup first user = admin; second = user; login returns JWT; unauthenticated API call → 401 + FE redirect; role-gated endpoint with wrong role → 403.
- **CRUD:** create with valid fields appears in grid; missing title/ingredients/instructions → 400; empty ingredients → specific "at least one ingredient" error; edit reflects in grid+detail; delete removes from grid; GET missing id → 404.
- **Search:** case-insensitive substring filters grid; no match → empty-state message.
- **Favorite:** toggle flips + persists; reload retains state; indicator updates immediately.
- **Resilience:** stop Postgres → load/create/update/delete → 503 + friendly UI message; `/api/health/deep` reflects DB down.
- **Perf:** seed 500 recipes, load grid, assert p95 < 300ms (owner + `lower(title)` indexes).
- **Deploy:** verify SPA + assets load under `/faithful-e2e-a/` path via ingress; deep links (`/recipes/:id`) resolve via SPA fallback.

## Risks
- **Base-path correctness** is the highest-risk item: Vite `base`, Router `basename`, and API prefix must all be `/faithful-e2e-a` or assets/deep links 404 behind the ingress rewrite.
- **Postgres provisioning** in-cluster requires a PVC; if the cluster lacks a default StorageClass, use an `emptyDir` fallback (data non-persistent) and note it.
- **Migrations on startup** must be idempotent to avoid crash-loops on redeploy (`Recreate` strategy, single replica).
- Per-user recipe scoping is an assumption; if global sharing was intended, remove owner filters (low effort, isolated to `recipes.service.ts`).
